items.title: A Third of Americans Are Having an “Existential Crisis”
items.desc: One out of every three Americans (32%) is having an "existential crisis"; that is, struggling with issues of meaning, purpose, and identity. These can be resolved in one of three ways: nihilism, rationalism, or faith.
